hero.tagline.1.message: The digital wallet that protects your future.

hero.tagline.2.message: Manage your finances with security and simplicity.

hero.tagline.3.message: Advanced biometric technology to protect your assets.

feature.easy.title.description: Title of the first homepage feature card

feature.easy.desc.message: ARGOS was designed from the ground up to be easy to use and install, so you can start managing your finances right away.
feature.easy.desc.description: Description of the first homepage feature card

feature.focus.title.description: Title of the second homepage feature card

feature.focus.desc.message: ARGOS helps you focus on what matters, and we take care of the rest. Organize your finances and manage your transactions from a single place.
feature.focus.desc.description: Description of the second homepage feature card

feature.security.title.description: Title of the third homepage feature card

feature.security.desc.message: Your security is our priority. ARGOS uses advanced encryption technology to protect your data and your money at all times.
feature.security.desc.description: Description of the third homepage feature card
